name: Nuclei
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Template-based vulnerability scanner from ProjectDiscovery. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.windows: Download the latest nuclei_*_windows_amd64.zip from https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei/releases, extract nuclei.exe, and place it on your PATH (or set a custom executable path in this tool's configuration). With Go installed, `go install github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei/v3/cmd/nuclei@latest` also works.
install_instructions.linux: Download the matching nuclei_*_linux_amd64.zip from https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei/releases and place the extracted binary on your PATH, or run `go install github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei/v3/cmd/nuclei@latest`.
install_instructions.macos: `brew install nuclei`, or download the nuclei_*_macOS_amd64.zip release from https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei/releases.
